event: A fruit stall with vendors and abundant produce
symbols: overflowing fruit — the abundance of God's provision in creation
market exchange — the commerce of daily life
description: A wide horizontal composition showing an enormous display of fruit arranged on tables and in baskets. Grapes in purple and green, apples, pears, figs, cherries, melons, pomegranates, and many other fruits fill the right two-thirds of the painting in lavish abundance. At left, two figures — a man and a woman in dark clothing — stand behind a counter, conversing. A small cat sits on the floor in the lower left. Vegetables including artichokes and leeks appear in the lower right foreground. The setting appears to be an indoor market or shop with a dark background.
